name: Tomorrow.io
description: Tomorrow.io is a weather intelligence platform providing hyper-local weather data with up to 1-minute time resolution. The API offers real-time conditions, forecasts up to 15 days ahead, historical weather data since 2000, weather map tiles, and configurable weather alerts with 80+ data fields including air quality.

capabilities.name: get_realtime_weather
capabilities.description: Get current weather conditions for a location including temperature, humidity, wind, pressure, precipitation, cloud cover, visibility, UV index, and weather code.

capabilities.name: get_forecast
capabilities.description: Get weather forecast with minutely, hourly, and daily breakdowns for up to 15 days ahead, with 80+ weather data fields.

capabilities.name: get_historical_weather
capabilities.description: Retrieve historical weather observations for any location going back to the year 2000, with customizable time resolution.

capabilities.name: get_weather_map_tile
capabilities.description: Get weather map tiles compatible with popular mapping libraries like Mapbox and Google Maps, showing precipitation, temperature, wind, and other layers.

capabilities.name: manage_alerts
capabilities.description: Create, retrieve, update, and delete weather alerts that trigger notifications when specific weather conditions are met at a location.
